--- Main Page ---
Norwood Vineyard | Wedding & Event Venue Near Atlanta
0
Unforgettable Celebrations at Norwood Vineyard
A Beautiful Private Vineyard Inspired by Nature
for Outdoor Weddings & Events in Jonesboro, GA
A Family Vineyard, Rooted on the Southside
A Bespoke Venue for Outdoor Weddings and Private Events.
Privately owned and tended by The Norwood Family since the 1950s.
Norwood Vineyard is a family-owned working vineyard in Jonesboro, GA with acres of beautiful muscadine vines and orchards located just 25 minutes from Atlanta. While the Vineyard has been owned by our family since the 1950s, in 2025 the Norwood family opened the vineyard publicly to host weddings and events year-round. Inspired by our grandparents’ simple yet rich lives on the family homestead, we invite you to experience true hospitality where the land knows how to hold you and those you love.
A Place
full of life
Explore the Vineyard Spaces
“Where do I begin to talk about this amazing experience! From the first phone call to event day, The Norwood’s were top notch! Working with Erika was by far the best experience I've had at a venue.
01. Love Notes
…the vineyard itself is incredibly beautiful. The views, the vineyard, the seating, the entire space is everything.” - Janis M.
Host Your Celebration at the Vineyard
We hold space for the family you come from
and the new one you'll create.
Explore Weddings at The Vineyard
We believe beautiful memories are wealth.
We are the keepers of memory, legacy and land.
While everything in this world is changing- we know true luxury is tradition. Somethings  only gets better with time.
Visit Christmas at The Vineyard
Natural beauty.
Lasting memories.
Open the Archive

--- Page: /events ---
Outdoor Event Venue Near Atlanta | Norwood Vineyard — Norwood Vineyard is & Gardens
0
The Perfect Place
for Making Memories
Events & Celebrations
at The Vineyard
A Private Vineyard for Showers, Birthdays & Meaningful Milestones
Outdoor Event Venue near Atlanta
Norwood Vineyard is a private, family-owned vineyard in Jonesboro, Georgia, thoughtfully designed for intimate, well-hosted celebrations. Just twenty minutes south of Atlanta, the property offers a scenic, open-air setting for baby showers, birthdays, graduations, engagement parties, networking gatherings, and private social events that deserve more than a standard event space.
This is a place for hosts who care about atmosphere, where guests linger, conversations unfold naturally, and the setting quietly does the work for you.
An Elevated Alternative to Traditional Event Spaces
The open vineyard landscape, natural light, and thoughtfully arranged gathering spaces create an elevated backdrop without feeling formal, stiff, or overdesigned.
Rather than a one-size-fits-all venue, hosts are invited to shape their celebration around the people and moments that matter most. Whether that looks like a beautiful outdoor baby shower luncheon, a milestone birthday gathering with live music, a garden graduation celebration, or a mid-week networking cocktail event with warmth character.
Thoughtful event packages range from $1,750 for an intimate garden celebration to $3,950 for a full day vineyard event with styling & decor.
Events Commonly Hosted at the Vineyard
Norwood’s Vineyard welcomes a wide range of events and celebrations, including:
Birthday celebrations
Baby & Bridal showers
Graduation parties
Cocktail parties
Engagement parties
Retirement celebrations
Milestone events
Networking & Social events
Private family gatherings
Each event is hosted with care, offering flexibility in layout, timing, and vendor selection.
Plan Your Vineyard Event
On the Vineyard & Orchard Lawn
In The Garden Room Pavilion
Venue Details
Hours & Capacity
We thoughtfully host events March-December | Monday-Sunday between the hours of 9 am and 9 pm.
Garden Room Tent:
75 seated / 100 standing
Vineyard Lawn & Orchard:
100 seated / 100 standing
Indoor/Outdoor Venue
Garden Room Tent
: Covered, weatherproof, climate regulated (AC units/heaters), hardwood floors
Vineyard Lawns:
open-air, garden umbrellas, high-peak garden tents
Norwood Vineyard allows you to enjoy events grounded in nature with stunning southern vineyard views without compromising on comfort.
Preferred Vendors
We maintain a list of preferred vendors who past clients have absolutely loved, however guests are welcome to use any vendors of their choice, including catering, styling and bartending.
Event Decor & Styling
In-house styling & decor services are offered by Debra Norwood of
Always June
.
Guests have the flexibility to use in-house services (included in select packages or added to any wedding package) or use their own preferred 3rd party decorator.
Venue Ame

--- Page: /seasonal-events ---
Seasonal Events at Norwood Vineyard Jonesboro | Outdoor Wine Gatherings & Things to Do Near Atlanta — Norwood Vineyard is & Gardens
0
Holidays at The Vineyard
We’ve planned these thoughtful, beautiful experiences
for you and your family to come and feel at home here, whenever the season calls.
Dec
21
Mimosas & Memoirs: Gifting Your Voice to the World | Sun, Dec 21
Sunday, December 21, 2025
2:00 PM
4:00 PM
Norwood Vineyard & Gardens
(map)
Google Calendar
ICS
Celebrate the season with a beautiful 21+ holiday gathering at Norwood’s Vineyard. Join publisher and co-founder Erika Norwood for Mimosas & Memoirs: Gifting Your Voice to the World, an intimate conversation and reading about the journey behind Love You and the power of turning your own story into a lasting gift.
21+ | Free Entry
View Event →
Dec
20
Closed for a Private Event (Wedding)
Saturday, December 20, 2025
8:00 AM
9:00 PM
Google Calendar
ICS
Norwood Vineyard & Gardens will be closed to the pubic on Saturday, December 20th for a private event.
View Event →
Dec
14
Cocoa & Cookie Decorating with Mrs. Claus | Sun, Dec 14th
Sunday, December 14, 2025
12:00 PM
4:00 PM
Norwood Vineyard & Gardens
(map)
Google Calendar
ICS
Join Mrs. Claus for a cozy afternoon of cookie decorating, holiday stories, warm cocoa, and festive family fun inside our heated Garden Living Room on December 14. This free, family-friendly event invites all ages to enjoy a sweet and nostalgic taste of Christmas at Norwood’s Vineyard.
Free | Open to the Public | All Ages + Adults
View Event →
Dec
13
Visit with Santa at his Gingerbread-Making Workshop | Sat, Dec 13th
Saturday, December 13, 2025
12:00 PM
4:00 PM
Norwood Vineyard & Gardens
(map)
Google Calendar
ICS
Join us for Santa’s Gingerbread Workshop, a festive day of holiday magic with Santa visits, gingerbread crafting, cozy cocoa, baked treats, and story time with Mrs. Claus. Held inside our beautifully heated Garden Living Room, this joyful family experience is free and open to all.
Free | Open to the Public | All Ages + Adults
View Event →
Dec
13
to Dec 14
Vineyard Holiday Market | Sat, Dec 13 & Sun, Dec 14
Sat, Dec 13, 2025
10:00 AM
Sun, Dec 14, 2025
4:00 PM
Norwood Vineyard & Gardens
(map)
Google Calendar
ICS
Step into our first-annual Grandma’s House Holiday Market for a cozy weekend of one-of-a-kind finds, complimentary cocoa, and festive holiday charm. Enjoy unique treasures, family games, and a warm, nostalgic atmosphere inside our fully heated Garden Living Room at Norwood’s Vineyard.
Free | Open to the Public | All Ages
View Event →
Dec
7
The Holiday Wrap Bar by Always June | Sat, Dec 7
Sunday, December 7, 2025
10:00 AM
4:00 PM
Norwood Vineyard & Gardens
(map)
Google Calendar
ICS
Discover The Holiday Wrap Bar by Always June, our seasonal gift-wrapping pop-up inside the cozy Living Garden Room at Norwood’s Vineyard. From simple priced wrapping bundles to beautifully crafted holiday wrapping service, we make your gifts look magical—so you can enjoy more of the sea

meta.meta_description:
Norwood Vineyard is an outdoor wedding and event venue near Atlanta located 
in Jonesboro, GA. The venue is perfect for vineyard weddings and outdoor 
celebrations, one of Atlanta’s most unique vineyards for outdoor weddings 
and events.
